name: Marmot
description: OpenClaw channel plugin for Marmot through the local dm-agent control socket.

marmot.label: Marmot
marmot.description: End-to-end encrypted Marmot groups through the local dm-agent connector.

enabled.description: Whether this Marmot channel instance is active.

accountIdHex.description: Marmot agent account id hex; required when dm-agent has more than one account.

authToken.description: Bearer token for a token-gated control socket.

authTokenFile.description: Path to a bearer token file.

groupIdHex.description: Optional inbound Marmot group id filter.

quicCandidates.description: quic:// preview broker candidates for live previews.

streaming.description: Live QUIC preview streaming: { mode: off|partial|block|progress } (boolean for legacy on/off). block is the safest preview mode; partial/progress recover durable finals from the OpenClaw transcript.

blockStreaming.description: Enable OpenClaw completed-block delivery into Marmot's live preview sink. Defaults on when QUIC candidates are configured and Marmot streaming is not off.

accounts.description: Per-account configs for multi-account mode, keyed by account id.
